description: This stylish pair of Unisex Jive Green flip flops from puma makes for a fantastic casual wear. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet, while the bright design gives an edgy look. The stitch detailing coupled with the synthetic straps is a perfect combination of comfort and style.   UpperSynthetic leather straps in a thong style, with stitch detailing and padded inner with brandingToe separator to hold the foot in placeSoft rubber cushioned footbed for in-step comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with suction points for absolute grip and tractionshoe care Wipe surface with clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
